show_call_opened.title: New call for shows 🎭

booking_accepted.message: {ownerName} has accepted your request for {seats} seat(s) for the trip from {locationCity} on {date}
booking_accepted.title: Request accepted! ✅

booking_cancelled.message: {passengerName} has cancelled their booking of {seats} seat(s) for the trip from {locationCity} on {date}
booking_cancelled.title: Booking cancelled 📅

booking_received.title: New carpool request 🚗

booking_rejected.message: {ownerName} has declined your request for {seats} seat(s) for the trip from {locationCity}
booking_rejected.title: Request declined
